summary: Comprehensive testing of Yazanaki Empire website - all backend APIs (26 tests) and frontend UI/integration tests passed successfully. Dark-themed Minecraft empire website with 5 core divisions, alliance application system, and 4 pages (Landing, Clans, Alliances, Systems).
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from API responses
Environment variables are correctly used for API URLs
Form validation works correctly with proper error messages
seed_data_creation: Test applications created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_yazanaki_api.py cover: service status, overview endpoint, alliance application CRUD with all enum validations. Frontend tests verified: landing page hero with SVG network visual, stats bar, 5 clan cards with 'Permanent Division' and 'Locked Structure' labels, Excalibur alliance card, philosophy section, navigation to all 4 pages, Apply dialog with form submission/ESC close/backdrop close, mobile navigation menu.

backend: GET /api/overview - core_divisions [SNU, ANO, ONF, ONA, KASAII] (PASS)
POST /api/alliances/apply - valid payload returns 200 with id, status=pending, created_at (PASS)
All enum values tested: sizes, specializations, alliance_types, contribution_capacities (PASS)
frontend: Landing page renders with 'Yazanaki Empire' title (PASS)
SVG network visual on hero section (PASS)
Stats bar: 5 Core Divisions / 1 Active Alliance / Structured Governance (PASS)
5 clan cards (SNU/ANO/ONF/ONA/KASAII) with 'Permanent Division' and 'Locked Structure' (PASS)
/alliances page with Excalibur card and 3-column system explanation (PASS)
Apply dialog opens from navbar, home page, alliances page (PASS)
Apply dialog closes with ESC key (PASS)
Apply dialog closes with backdrop click (PASS)
Apply dialog form submission works with success confirmation (PASS)
No console errors on any page (PASS)
Dark theme with proper text contrast (PASS)
